---
name: New User Challenge
description: Report onboarding confusion or first-run blockers as a new user
title: "challenge: "
labels: ["enhancement", "challenge:new-user"]
assignees: []
---

## User Goal

- What were you trying to do?

## Expected Outcome

- What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Outcome

- What happened instead?

## Repro Steps

1. Command/path used:
2. Inputs used:
3. Where it became confusing:

## Environment

- OS:
- Shell:
- Repo ref/branch:

## Why This Blocked You

- What decision or next step could you not make?

## Suggested Minimal Fix

- Docs wording change, command UX change, demo update, or feature gap?

## Story Mapping

- Which user story does this most closely impact? (`1..13`)
